name: Interval Component
description: This component allows you to run actions at fixed time intervals. For example, if you want to toggle a switch every minute, you can use this component. Please note that it's possible to achieve the same thing with the [time.on_time](https://esphome.io/components/time#time-on_time) trigger, but this technique is more light-weight and user-friendly.

config_entries.label: Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to execute the action with.

config_entries.label: Startup Delay
config_entries.description: An optional startup delay - defaults to zero.
